name: App Transport Security Compliance
description: All network connections must use HTTPS. ATS exceptions in Info.plist must be justified and minimal.
auto_fix_hint: Remove NSAllowsArbitraryLoads from Info.plist; use HTTPS endpoints only

examples.good: // Use only https:// URLs; remove ATS exceptions from Info.plist

name: Network Timeout Configuration
description: All URLSession requests must have explicit timeouts. Default 60s timeout is too long for banking UX.
auto_fix_hint: Set timeoutIntervalForRequest and timeoutIntervalForResource in URLSessionConfiguration

examples.good:
let config = URLSessionConfiguration.default
config.timeoutIntervalForRequest = 15
config.timeoutIntervalForResource = 30
let session = URLSession(configuration: config)

name: Retry with Exponential Backoff
description: Network requests should implement retry with exponential backoff, not simple fixed-delay retries.
auto_fix_hint: Implement exponential backoff: delay = min(base * 2^attempt, maxDelay) + jitter

examples.good: try await RetryPolicy.exponential(maxAttempts: 3) { try await api.fetch() }

name: Error Handling for Network Failures
description: Network calls must handle all error cases explicitly — no silent failures or catch-all ignoring.
auto_fix_hint: Handle URLError cases explicitly and propagate errors to the UI layer

examples.bad:
let (data, _) = try? URLSession.shared.data(from: url) ?? (Data(), nil)
// ❌ Silently ignores errors
